title: Explain research limitations
subtitle: Scope, data, and caution.
overview: Module: Professional and Academic Communication. B2 Med strengthens abstract discussion, source response, professional communication, precise style, revision, and independent output.

sections.title: B2 med focus
rows: Academic-style English often requires explaining what the evidence cannot show.
学术风格英语常常需要解释证据不能说明什么。
B2 Med frame: define the purpose, address the audience, support the point, and propose a next step.
B2 Med 框架：定义目的、面向听众、支撑观点，并提出下一步。
Explain the limitations of simple research.
解释一个简单研究的局限。
The survey suggests a pattern, but it has limitations. The sample is small, and it does not show whether the same results would appear with learners at different levels.
这个调查显示了一种规律，但它有局限。样本很小，而且它不能说明不同水平学习者是否会出现同样结果。

items.en: Academic-style English often requires explaining what the evidence cannot show.
items.zh: 学术风格英语常常需要解释证据不能说明什么。

items.en: B2 Med frame: define the purpose, address the audience, support the point, and propose a next step.
items.zh: B2 Med 框架：定义目的、面向听众、支撑观点，并提出下一步。

items.en: The survey suggests a pattern, but it has limitations. The sample is small, and it does not show whether the same results would appear with learners at different levels.
items.zh: 这个调查显示了一种规律，但它有局限。样本很小，而且它不能说明不同水平学习者是否会出现同样结果。

items.en: I will make the idea precise before I try to make it sound advanced.
items.zh: 我会先让意思准确，再尝试让它听起来高级。

items.en: A strong B2 answer usually includes a condition, a limitation, or a fair counterpoint.
items.zh: 强 B2 回答通常包括条件、限制或公平的反方观点。

items.en: If the wording feels too abstract, I will add one concrete example from real life.
items.zh: 如果措辞感觉太抽象，我会加入一个来自真实生活的具体例子。

items.en: I can revise my answer for logic, tone, and rhythm.
items.zh: 我可以从逻辑、语气和节奏上修改我的回答。

items.en: This lesson is complete only when I can use the idea in my own words.
items.zh: 只有当我能用自己的话使用这个想法时，这节课才算完成。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Explain the limitations of simple research.
lines.zh: 解释一个简单研究的局限。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: The survey suggests a pattern, but it has limitations. The sample is small, and it does not show whether the same results would appear with learners at different levels.
lines.zh: 这个调查显示了一种规律，但它有局限。样本很小，而且它不能说明不同水平学习者是否会出现同样结果。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you make the answer more precise or more concrete?
lines.zh: 你能让回答更准确或更具体吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will narrow the claim, add one example, and mention one limitation.
lines.zh: 可以。我会缩小主张、加入一个例子，并提到一个限制。

items.en: Explain the limitations of simple research.
items.zh: 解释一个简单研究的局限。

items.en: Answer once in six sentences with a clear structure.
items.zh: 用六句话做一次结构清楚的回答。

items.en: Add one B2 phrase such as that said, in practice, arguably, or the real issue is.
items.zh: 加入一个 B2 短语，比如 that said、in practice、arguably 或 the real issue is。

items.en: Record the answer, then rewrite the strongest sentence more naturally.
items.zh: 录下回答，然后把最强的一句改得更自然。

items.en: Use the revised sentence tomorrow in a different topic.
items.zh: 明天在不同话题中使用修改后的句子。
